title: Production Database Migration with Maintenance Mode
description:
Put the website in maintenance mode via Cloudflare page rules before executing the production database migration, ensuring no users can log in during the migration window.

### Steps
1. Enable maintenance mode via Cloudflare page rules for datatoolspro.com
2. Execute database migration
3. Verify data integrity
4. Disable maintenance mode
acceptance_criteria: Website is in maintenance mode during migration
No user logins are possible during the migration window
Maintenance mode is disabled after migration
data_model_changes: Production database migrated during maintenance window.
implementation_notes: Maintenance mode is managed via Cloudflare page rules at https://dash.cloudflare.com/793f7335750a59df1875417444438bd1/datatoolspro.com/rules/page-rules.
